description: Approved repo-level .opencode/ exceptions. Each repo may contain non-hook content only if explicitly approved by an ADR or profile mapping.

apa-digital-asset-product.reason: APA requires domain-specific agents (blockchain/stablecoin, compliance/AML, treasury ops) and custom factory commands that differ from workspace-level agents.
apa-digital-asset-product.review_condition: Expires when APA migrates to workspace-level agent model or Phase C4 migration completes.

career-ops.reason: career-ops has repo-specific OpenCode commands for career pipeline management. No agent definitions or runtime config changes.
career-ops.review_condition: Review if career-ops adds agent definitions or opencode.json.

protected-repo.reason: ARCHIVED — local-first prototype. No active development. Profile set to archived.
protected-repo.review_condition: Archived repo. No new content should be added to .opencode/.

protected-repo-prod.reason: ui_ux profile requires Playwright and Pencil MCP enabled. Repo-local opencode.json contains MCP overrides only.
protected-repo-prod.review_condition: Review if protected-repo-prod adds agent definitions or non-MCP config to opencode.json.

example-app.reason: ui_ux profile requires Playwright and Pencil MCP enabled. Repo-local opencode.json contains MCP overrides only.
example-app.review_condition: Review if example-app adds agent definitions or non-MCP config to opencode.json.

example-orchestrator-PROD.reason: ui_ux profile requires Playwright and Pencil MCP enabled. Repo-local opencode.json contains MCP overrides only.
example-orchestrator-PROD.review_condition: Review if example-orchestrator-PROD adds agent definitions or non-MCP config to opencode.json.

demo-project.review_condition: Review if demo-project adds agent definitions or non-MCP config to opencode.json.
